title: The Power Of The One God Doctrine
summary: [Genesis 3:8 And they heard the voice of the LORD God walking in the garden in the cool of the day: and Adam and his wife hid themselves from the presence of the LORD God amongst the trees of the garden.] As long as Adam and Eve believed that God is one and walked with the word of God (voice of God), they enjoyed paradise and knew no shame, although they were naked. Only those who believe that God is one alone and love the voice of God can stay in God’s paradise. They will not know shame because the power of the one God doctrine will declare us innocent and cover our shame. The first time Adam and Eve heard anyone declare that God is not alone, was from the lying lips of Satan. Our first parents obviously knew that God is one – they met him on a regular basis; his voice and presence was one. Apostolic Christian, please beware, all Satan needs to do to cast us out of paradise is to help us believe in the existence of more than one God. What was the result? When we no longer believe in one God, it is not possible for us to respond to his call. Adam and Eve hid themselves; they could not answer the one God. Thank God we can respond to the call of God today because we believe he is one and alone. Remember that Adam and Eve did not know what fear was before this time. A new emotion, which they had never experienced before, entered their universe – they were filled with fear and trembling.
